---
title: "Generalized Additive Models and beyond with P-splines"
subtitle: "XV Summer School MESIO, 2022" 
author: "Course Material"
date: "July 4-10, 2022"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: cerulean
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

---------------

# Preliminares

### Requisitos

  + Última versión del software `R` ([`https://www.r-project.org`](https://www.r-project.org)).

  + `Rstudio` ([`https://www.rstudio.com`](https://www.rstudio.com)).


### Librerías necesarias

 ```{r, echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE}
install.packages(c("deSolve","bbmle","tidyverse","ggplot2","dplyr","lubridate","shiny","shinySIR","outbreaks","coronavirus"))
```

----------------

#  Material día 19

  - Presentación [Tutorial_parte1.pdf](pdf/Tutorial_Parte1.pdf)
  
  - Códigos en `R`.
  
     + [Tutorial_Parte1.R](code/Tutorial_Parte1.R)
  
     + [Enlace](https://idaejin.github.io/courses/eustat2020/material/code/Ejemplos_Parte1.html) y código [Ejemplos_Parte1.R](code/Ejemplos_Parte1.R)
